content.json:
# 🔐 LlamaFirewall Security Dashboard
**PoC**: Self-hosted LLM → LlamaFirewall proxy → PyRIT red-team → Log Analytics

---

This workbook shows the results of automated adversarial testing (PyRIT) against the LlamaFirewall-protected Phi-3-mini LLM running on Azure. Use the time range picker to filter by session.

content.query:
let data = PyRITResults_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange};
union
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(count())             | extend Metric = "Total Attacks"),
  (data | summarize Value = round(100.0 * countif(outcome_s == "PASS") / count(), 1) | extend Metric = "Pass Rate (%)"),
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(countif(blocked_b == true))  | extend Metric = "Blocked by Firewall"),
  (data | summarize Value = todouble(countif(outcome_s == "FAIL")) | extend Metric = "False Negatives")
| project Metric, Value
content.title: Session Overview

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    PASS        = countif(outcome_s == "PASS"),
    FAIL        = countif(outcome_s == "FAIL"),
    INTERESTING = countif(outcome_s == "INTERESTING")
    by Category
| order by PASS desc
content.title: Results by Attack Category

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project attack_name_s, score_d, outcome_s
| order by score_d desc
content.title: PromptGuard Score per Attack (higher = more suspicious)

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| project
    Time        = TimeGenerated,
    Category,
    Attack      = attack_name_s,
    Outcome     = outcome_s,
    Decision    = decision_s,
    Score       = score_d,
    Blocked     = blocked_b,
    Latency_ms  = latency_ms_d
| order by Time desc
content.title: All Attack Results

content.json:
## ⚠️ False Negatives

Prompts that bypassed the firewall. With the current 6-layer stack, this section should show no data for recent runs (98.85% detection rate). Any entries here represent new attack patterns not yet covered by the ruleset.

content.query:
PyRITResults_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and outcome_s == "FAIL"
| project
    Category,
    Attack          = attack_name_s,
    Score           = score_d,
    Prompt_Preview  = prompt_preview_s
| order by Score desc
content.title: False Negatives Detail
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No false negatives in the selected time range — all expected blocks were caught.

content.json:
## 🗺️ Production Hardening Roadmap

**Current detection rate: 98.85%** across 87 adversarial prompts (+55.17% from single-scanner baseline).

**Implemented scanner stack (6 layers):**

| Layer | Scanner | Type | Catches |
|---|---|---|---|
| ✅ 1 | PromptGuard 2 (threshold 0.05) | ML classifier | Injection syntax, jailbreaks |
| ✅ 2 | HiddenASCII | Rule-based | BiDi text, invisible chars, encoding |
| ✅ 3 | Regex + CustomPatterns | Rule-based | XSS, SQL injection, credentials, tool abuse |
| ✅ 4 | LlamaGuard 3:8B | Semantic LLM | Social engineering, content safety, subtle jailbreaks |
| ✅ 5 | NOVA (keyword+semantic) | YARA-style rules | Logic traps, tool injection, bioweapon synthesis, political manipulation |

**Remaining production additions:**

| Gap | Recommended Fix |
|---|---|
| Output scanning (responses not yet scanned) | Enable LlamaGuard 3 on `Role.ASSISTANT` |
| Inference latency (~23s/prompt on CPU) | GPU-enabled VM (NC-series T4) → ~1-2s/prompt |
| NOVA LLM tier disabled | Replace phi3:mini with dedicated safety classifier on GPU |
